title: M.Sc Jobs 2026 – Student Internship
shortInfo: Central University of Kerala Student Internship Recruitment 2026 has been announced for 1 Student Internship post for eligible undergraduate engineering and postgraduate Science candidates, with the offline application process open until 08-06-2026 on cukerala.ac.in.

basic_details.job_title: Central University of Kerala Student Internship Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Central University of Kerala Student Internship Recruitment 2026 has been announced for 1 Student Internship post for eligible undergraduate engineering and postgraduate Science candidates, with the offline application process open until 08-06-2026 on cukerala.ac.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Students in undergraduate engineering or postgraduate Science disciplines
qualification.details: Students in undergraduate engineering or postgraduate Science disciplines.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the Central University of Kerala Student Internship?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Student Internship post at the Central University of Kerala is 08-06-2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Student Internship position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Student Internship position will receive a stipend of Rs. 5000 per month. This is a contractual role.

faq.question: What are the educational qualifications required for this internship?
faq.answer: To be eligible for this internship, candidates must be students pursuing undergraduate engineering or postgraduate Science disciplines. Specific details can be found in the official notification.

faq.question: How can I apply for the Central University of Kerala Student Internship?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it via post to the address specified in the notification.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: What is the selection process for the Student Internship?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Student Internship at the Central University of Kerala will be based on an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Where is the Central University of Kerala located?
faq.answer: The Central University of Kerala is located in Periye, Kerala, with the pincode 671316. The internship opportunity is based at this location.

faq.question: What is the duration of the internship?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify the exact duration of the internship. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for details regarding the internship period.

faq.question: Will there be any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not provide specific age limits or details on age relaxation. Candidates are encouraged to check the official advertisement for any such information.

faq.question: What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents, which typically include a photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant academic certificates. Refer to the notification for a complete list.
